title: Add CLI replay for grouped candidate follow-ups

title: Preserve invalid_group_followup teaching errors in CLI JSON stderr
diff_sketch: Teach src/cli.ts to recognize SearchSessionsInputError and emit error.code invalid_group_followup with invalidField, correctedShape, and a copy-ready --group-candidates @payload.json command.

title: Teach result-mode typos and reject mixed group-follow-up flags
diff_sketch: Suggest candidates/evidence/debug for close --mode misspellings and reject --group-candidates when mixed with search-shaping flags that the server-prepared payload already owns.
